channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Justice V K Mohanan Commission submits 141 safety recommendations after Tanur boat tragedy
item.description: The Justice V K Mohanan Commission of Inquiry, set up to investigate the tragic Tanur boat accident of May 7, 2023 in Malappuram district of Kerala, has submitted its final 14-volume report to Chief M...

item.title: TikToker from Kisii Faces Family Conflict as Uncle Blocks Road to Stop Construction
item.description: A Kisii-based TikToker, Nyamari Clinton, has shared an unsettling video revealing how his uncle allegedly blocked the access road to prevent the delivery of building materials for a new home he's cons...

item.title: Full cast revealed for Celebrity Traitors series two in the Scottish Highlands
item.description: The second series of The Celebrity Traitors has officially announced its star-studded cast, featuring 21 celebrities including actors, musicians, comedians, and presenters. Following the success of th...

item.title: Tanzanian PhD Student Ngasuma Achieves Global Recognition at Harvard
item.description: Ms Ngasuma Eva Kanyeka, a Tanzanian PhD student at Harvard University, has been recognised as one of the country’s most influential figures in youth innovation, entrepreneurship, and policy reform. Sh...

item.title: Hafizabad police arrest prime suspect in rape and kidnapping case of 13-year-old girl
item.description: According to police sources in Punjab's Hafizabad district, authorities have arrested one main suspect involved in the alleged rape and kidnapping of a 13-year-old girl. The incident was reported on A...

item.title: South Africa’s trade surplus decreases to R31.9 billion in March amid rising exports and imports
item.description: South Africa recorded a preliminary trade surplus of R31.9 billion in March 2026, down from a revised R35.9 billion in February, according to data released by the South African Revenue Service. Export...

item.title: IEC Intensifies Preparations for South Africa's Local Government Elections on 4 November 2026
item.description: The Electoral Commission of South Africa (IEC) has welcomed the announcement by President Cyril Ramaphosa that the next Local Government Elections will take place on 4 November 2026. Chief Electoral O...

item.title: Winnie Odinga jokes about her mother Ida urging her to marry during high-profile wedding
item.description: In a light-hearted moment at the traditional wedding of Catherine Jepchumba, daughter of businessman Kiprono Kittony, Winnie Odinga left guests in stitches with her funny remarks. The event, which ble...

item.title: Pakistan's Leaders Pledge to Strengthen Workers' Rights on Labour Day
item.description: On International Labour Day, Pakistan's President Asif Ali Zardari and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif honoured workers and reaffirmed their commitment to improving labour rights across the nation. Pres...

item.title: Edmonton fans react to Oilers' first-round playoff loss
item.description: Edmonton Oilers supporters are grappling with disappointment after their team was eliminated in the first round of the Stanley Cup playoffs by the Anaheim Ducks. Fans expressed sadness and frustration...

item.title: CSIS report reveals China and India as key foreign interference actors in Canada
item.description: A recent report from Canada's national intelligence agency, CSIS, highlights that both China and India are among the primary sources of foreign interference in the country. The 2025 report details the...

item.title: Man arrested over bomb hoax after Peter Kay's show cut short in Birmingham
item.description: A 19-year-old man has been arrested on suspicion of a bomb hoax after comedian Peter Kay's performance was abruptly cut short at Birmingham's Utilita Arena on Friday evening. The incident occurred 45 ...

item.title: The Meaning of Workers’ Day Parade in Nigeria and the Struggle for Fair Wages
item.description: Every 1st of May, Nigerian workers dey show solidarity through the Workers’ Day parade wey dey organised by NLC and TUC. This event no be only celebration; e na serious protest and demand platform. E ...

item.title: BBC Announces Full Cast for Celebrity Traitors Series Two
item.description: The BBC has officially revealed the cast for the second series of Celebrity Traitors, with the announcement accompanied by a teaser trailer on 2 May 2026. Leading the line-up are high-profile names in...

item.title: US pushes allies to join new coalition to secure Strait of Hormuz amid rising tensions with Iran
item.description: The United States is seeking international support to reopen the Strait of Hormuz after Iran blocked shipping routes following a bombing campaign by the US and Israel in late February. Despite earlier...

item.title: Atin Ito Mission Advocates for Peace and Sovereignty in the West Philippine Sea Ahead of Asean Summit
item.description: Ahead of the 48th Asean Summit, the Atin Ito coalition launched its fourth civilian mission to Pag-asa Island to promote peace and sovereignty in the West Philippine Sea (WPS). The mission, running fr...

item.title: Driver Charged Following Fatal Wimbledon School Incident
item.description: Prosecutors have formally charged Claire Freemantle over a tragic crash in Wimbledon that resulted in the deaths of two eight-year-old girls, Nuria Sajjad and Selena Lau, during an end-of-term tea par...

item.title: Government Steps Up Tree Planting Campaign to Prepare Citizens for Carbon Trading Benefits
item.description: The Tanzanian government is intensifying public education on tree planting by focusing on influential groups like Members of Parliament to boost participation in carbon trading opportunities. Deputy M...

item.title: 65-Year-Old Man Arrested for Rape and Murder of 4-Year-Old Girl in Pune's Bhor Taluka
item.description: In a shocking and heartbreaking incident from Nasrapur village in Bhor taluka of Pune district, a 65-year-old man has been arrested for the alleged rape and brutal murder of a four-year-old girl. The ...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rainfall to Reduce by Mid-May
item.description: Kenyans who have been struggling with relentless heavy rains might soon get a breather as the Kenya Meteorological Department (Kenya Met) forecasts a significant decrease in rainfall from mid-May. The...
